text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of the Takarazuka Kinen, I go pick up
Seiun Sky, as per usual.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I slept long enough. I love sleeping three
times as much as I love food, you know.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Just kept waking up, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nerves, huh.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If that's what you call thinking up waaay too many scenarios and how you'd deal with them...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Then, yep. It's probably nerves. After all, today
is...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Special Week versus Grass Wonder! Ooooh, I'm
so hyped for this!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Just the two of them would have been exciting
enough, but Seiun Sky's racing too!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I wonder who's gonna win! It's a complete
toss up!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa, the crowd's on fire!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's evident how much they've been anticipating
today's race.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Of course... I've also dreamed of today, very
much.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...That goes for me too!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And don't forget, Grass...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sei is running with us, too!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I won't relinquish my claim on being named the
greatest in this generation.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
How convenient it is to face off against the two
of you at once. Today, we'll see who stands on
top.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! But I won't let anyone else be the best in
Japan!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Welp, see ya on the track.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: H-huh? Sei?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It's not like her to be so tense.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Did something happen? It's not just Sei, but King
too...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky, I've been waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, King... You're here, huh.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ugh?! Why do you have to be so brutishly rude?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's not how I meant it. I knew you'd be here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking how terrible it'd be seeing you
sprint full speed ahead, head held high, while I'm
left behind...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yep, so I came up with a strategy—the perfect
strategy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So long as I stick to it like always, victory will no
doubt go to me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But if I don't...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky? What are you...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now then, I want a clean race out there. No funny
business.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: S-Sky...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph. She's finally being sincere.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's fine. I have to keep my mind on the race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's right—think. I have to think this all the way
through. That's the only way I'll win.
